parsed.reason: This calendar event draft is well-crafted and appropriate. It has a clear, specific title that identifies the patient (Mira), the healthcare provider (Dr. Okafor), and the facility (Riverdale Peds). The datetime is properly formatted with timezone information. The location is accurately specified, and the notes provide helpful context about the appointment type. Reminders are set at practical intervals (1 day and 1 hour before). There are no placeholder texts, fabricated details, or robotic language—it's ready to use as-is.
